title: Align DAO Path Sequence parent changes
description: LICHEN requires the complete redundant candidate set for one Target and Path Sequence to be packed into one atomic DAO. Align Rust with that profile: equal Path Sequence is exact idempotent replay only; reject later candidate additions, existing-candidate mutation, lifetime/Path Control refresh, stale withdrawal, and ambiguous updates.
acceptance_criteria: A newer Path Sequence atomically installs the complete grouped candidate set; equal Path Sequence accepts only an exact idempotent copy; parent/lifetime/Path Control changes require a newer sequence; stale, expiry, withdrawal, replay, and capacity tests pass in all implementations.
